name: Whispering Farms Equestrian Center
description: A full-service equestrian facility in the Dallas/Fort Worth area offering exceptional boarding and training with a focus on horse welfare and rider development. Staff is on premises 24/7, providing premium Tifton 85 hay four times daily and top-quality grain.

trainers.name: Whispering Farms Training Team
trainers.bio: Three in-house trainers specializing in dressage, eventing, and hunter/jumper disciplines.

name: Meadow Lake Equestrian Center
description: A picturesque 130-acre full-care boarding and show facility in Lancaster, Kentucky. With 45 roomy stalls across 3 barns, spacious paddocks with traditional 4-board fencing, and multiple arenas including a large well-lit indoor, Meadow Lake offers top-quality care in a quiet atmosphere.

trainers.name: Meadow Lake Coaching Staff
trainers.bio: Multiple on-site coaches providing lessons and training in eventing and dressage at all levels.

name: North Jersey Equestrian Center
description: The Tri-State's premiere riding center featuring New Jersey's largest climate-controlled indoor arena at 135x300 feet. With 103 matted 12x12 stalls, trainers specializing in Western, English, Hunters, Jumpers, and Dressage, and seven-day-a-week operation from 8am to 8pm.

trainers.name: NJEC Training Staff
trainers.bio: Experienced trainers covering Western, English, Hunters, Jumpers, and Dressage at all levels.

name: Riviere Equestrian Farm
description: A world-class equestrian facility inaugurated in March 2022, located just 7 miles from the World Equestrian Center and HITS Ocala. Features 22 brand new rubber-matted stalls, a covered arena (220x120 ft), large paddocks with daily turnout, and an A/C tack room.

trainers.name: Riviere Farm Staff
trainers.bio: Experienced equestrian professionals providing top-quality care and training near the World Equestrian Center.

name: Eden Farms
description: A family-owned horse stable on 160 acres of rolling fields in Upstate South Carolina near Greenville. Offers 40 stalls, horseback riding lessons, trail rides through the Blue Ridge Mountains, and hosts birthday parties and special events.

trainers.name: Eden Farms Staff
trainers.bio: Experienced staff providing riding instruction, trail guiding, and therapeutic equestrian programs.

name: Castlewood Ranch
description: A 30-acre private equestrian facility in the Aptos Hills of California. Offers limited horse boarding in covered pipe stalls, large shared paddocks, or seasonal pasture.

trainers.name: Castlewood Ranch Instructor
trainers.bio: Experienced instructor offering individual and group lessons with a focus on jumping and cross-country training.

name: James River Equestrian Center
description: A well-established boarding and training facility in Richmond, Virginia featuring 22 spacious 12x12 stalls, two dusk-to-dawn lighted arenas, and abundant turnout space. Stall boarders receive a mandatory weekly lesson to ensure rider-horse partnership development.

trainers.name: JREC Instructor
trainers.bio: Experienced riding instructor providing mandatory weekly lessons for stall boarders and optional training programs.

name: Garrod Farms Stable
description: A unique equestrian facility paired with an estate winery in the heart of Silicon Valley. Set in Saratoga, California, Garrod Farms offers boarding options ranging from fields and pastures to paddocks and barn stalls.

name: Greene Valley Stables
description: A 38-acre horse boarding facility in Ruckersville, Virginia offering both indoor and outdoor boarding. Features a 20-stall barn, a 60x200 lighted show-regulation indoor riding arena, and a wash stall with hot and cold water.

trainers.name: Greene Valley Instructor
trainers.bio: Private riding instructor offering lessons at $40/hour across multiple disciplines.

name: Keelona Farm
description: Established in 1984, Keelona Farm sits on 75 acres with miles of open riding trails in Charlottesville, Virginia. The custom-built 14-stall barn features 12x12 stalls with several 12x24 foaling stalls.

name: Sunny Fox Farms
description: An equestrian facility in the Texas Hill Country serving San Marcos and Wimberley. Boarding includes access to tack room space, use of all amenities, deworming, supplement and blanket management, and three free lessons per week.

trainers.name: Sunny Fox Farms Instructor
trainers.bio: On-site instructor providing three included lessons per week for all boarders.

name: Riverbend Equestrian Center
description: A premier boarding facility in Jupiter Farms, Florida featuring 12x12 stalls, an on-site barn manager, a 266x135 ft fully irrigated ring, and individual grass turnouts. Caters to hunters, jumpers, dressage, and trail riders.

trainers.name: Riverbend Training Staff
trainers.bio: Experienced trainers specializing in hunters, jumpers, and dressage with on-site barn management.

name: Westridge Farms
description: Premier Hunter/Jumper stable located in Dripping Springs, Texas, only 30 minutes west of downtown Austin. Westridge Farms welcomes riders of all levels, offering quality training, exceptional care, and a fun atmosphere.

trainers.name: Christine Rishell
trainers.bio: Owner and head trainer. Started riding at age 5, earned USEF Bronze Medal in 2012. Trains with enthusiasm, creativity, structure, respect, and humor.

trainers.name: Mia Kertson
trainers.bio: Assistant trainer and Texas Tech graduate with a successful junior and collegiate riding career.

name: Redwood Farm
description: Where Excellence Meets Horsemanship. Redwood Farm works with riders of all levels to transform them into top competitors through a comprehensive program built on horsemanship, trust, and partnership between horse and rider.

trainers.name: Ashleigh Stewart
trainers.bio: Founder and head trainer with 18+ years of experience. Grew up riding with Fran and Joe Dotoli in Massachusetts. Detail-oriented, hands-on instruction emphasizing thoughtful development and long-term success.

trainers.name: Hayden Stewart
trainers.bio: Co-trainer who finished Top 25 at both the USEF Medal Finals and the ASPCA Maclay Finals in 2016. Competed in High Junior Jumpers and national grand prix. Texas A&M Equestrian Team rider.

trainers.name: Debbie Seymour
trainers.bio: Freelance trainer with 35+ years in the hunter/jumper industry. Co-founded Bit by Bit Farms in 2002. Has coached riders to Pony Finals and Junior Hunter Finals.

name: Rio Vista Farm
description: The Leading Hunter Jumper Barn in Austin, Texas since 1995. Rio Vista Farm is a full care Hunter Jumper Boarding and Training Facility offering private and group lessons for beginners through competitive riders, summer camps for ages 7-16, and a show team competing from Cross Rails to Grand Prix.

trainers.name: Susan McMarris
trainers.bio: Head trainer. Meredith Manor School of Equestrian Studies graduate (1984). Operating hunter/jumper barns since 1985. Board Member of the Texas Hunter Jumper Association. Specializes in taking riders from summer camp level to year-end high point winner.

trainers.name: Emilie Gardner
trainers.bio: Assistant trainer and West Texas A&M graduate who competes nationally.

trainers.name: Lauri Bothern
trainers.bio: Assistant trainer with 20+ years of teaching experience, working with all age groups.

trainers.name: Haylee Mynyk
trainers.bio: Assistant trainer with 25 years of experience, present since Rio Vista's inception.

name: Glendaloch Farm
description: Glendaloch Farm focuses on the joy of riding. Students are taught horsemanship and Hunter/Jumper riding skills that can take them to any level. The operation values camaraderie, challenge, and delight in riding and showing, with instruction available for beginners through advanced riders.

trainers.name: Crista Bandini
trainers.bio: Head trainer with over 40 years of riding experience, offering lessons for hunter/jumper enthusiasts at all skill levels.

name: Polo Club Equine
description: Polo Club Equine is located on 28 acres in the beautiful Hill Country towards Dripping Springs. In each of their barns, you will find clean and spacious stalls. The facility offers equestrian horse training and is open 7 days a week. Rated 5.0 stars on Google.

name: Galloping Springs Ranch
description: Dressage training, lessons, and sales in Dripping Springs. World class instruction in a warm and welcoming environment. Galloping Springs Ranch has operated in the Texas Hill Country for more than 20 years. Home of Ashley Shaw Dressage.

trainers.name: Ashley Shaw
trainers.bio: Dressage specialist providing world class instruction at Galloping Springs Ranch.

name: White Fences Equestrian Center
description: Premium full-care horse boarding and professional training just outside Austin in Manor, Texas. White Fences provides exceptional care, large barns, expansive pastures, and a quiet, supportive environment.

name: Switch Willo Stables
description: Unsurpassed excellence in Hunter/Jumper training and competition. Located on 26 beautifully wooded acres in the heart of Northwest Austin, Switch Willo Stables provides the perfect environment in which horses and riders can develop and flourish.

trainers.name: Holly Mortimer
trainers.bio: Lessons coordinator at Switch Willo Stables.

trainers.name: Wendy Kratzer
trainers.bio: Camp coordinator at Switch Willo Stables.

name: Scissortail Hill Equestrian
description: A horse riding school in Austin, Texas rated 5.0 stars on Google. Located on US-183, Scissortail Hill Equestrian provides equestrian instruction and training services to the Austin area.

name: Upland Farm
description: Elite dressage training facility for the avid dressage rider in the heart of Texas Hill Country. Founded by Marcia Haas and Ashley Bearden, Upland Farm is a community of good people who love their horses and support each other.

trainers.name: Marcia Haas
trainers.bio: Co-founder of Upland Farm, providing elite dressage training in the Texas Hill Country.

trainers.name: Ashley Bearden
trainers.bio: Co-founder of Upland Farm, focused on developing riders and horses through classical dressage.

name: Cadence Ranch
description: Classical Dressage Training, Instruction, and Sales on 50 acres in Central Texas with 24/7 pasture turnout. Features a standard 20x60 indoor dressage arena, air-conditioned tack room, TheraPlate equine therapy system, and SI PEMF therapy blanket.

trainers.name: Christine Calao
trainers.bio: Owner and head trainer, USDF Gold Medalist.

trainers.name: Emma Winter
trainers.bio: Assistant trainer, USDF Bronze Medalist.

name: Waterloo Dressage
description: Dressage instruction and horse training facility in Austin, Texas operated by Grace Harris. Offers rider instruction, horse training, and horses for sale or lease.

trainers.name: Grace Harris
trainers.bio: Dressage instructor and horse trainer at Waterloo Dressage.

name: Riding Club of Austin
description: A woman-owned full-service equestrian facility conveniently located in Southwest Austin. Offers boarding services and horseback riding instruction. Rated 5.0 stars on Google.

name: Creekside Eventing
description: Creekside Eventing is a 22-acre equestrian facility in Georgetown, TX specializing in 3-day eventing, which includes dressage, show jumping, and cross-country. We provide premium horse boarding with lessons and training from an experienced Olympic-level eventing trainer.

trainers.name: Megan Hammerlind
trainers.bio: Olympic-level three-day eventing trainer and co-owner of Creekside Eventing. Specializes in producing competitive eventing horses and riders.

name: Maverick Horseback Riding
description: Maverick Horseback Riding serves central Texas specializing in unique equine experiences. Services include trail rides, private lessons, camps, training, and events across multiple locations including Austin, Lockhart, Bastrop, Blanco, Canyon Lake, Spicewood, and Gonzales.

trainers.name: Maverick Instructors
trainers.bio: Experienced western riding instructors offering private lessons and trail rides across central Texas.

name: Lone Star Ranch
description: Austin's destination for horseback riding, riding lessons, ranch parties, kids' camps, and so much more. Located on a 400-acre ranch just minutes from downtown Austin.

trainers.name: Lone Star Ranch Instructors
trainers.bio: Experienced cowgirls, guys, lesson instructors, and excursion guides offering western and English lessons on a 400-acre Austin ranch.

name: SunCrest Farm
description: SunCrest Farm is located on 18 acres just outside of Austin in Manor, TX. The ideal place for lessons, summer day camps, trail rides, birthday parties, and more. First-time and experienced riders of all ages and disciplines are welcome, offering both western and English riding.

trainers.name: SunCrest Farm Instructors
trainers.bio: Welcoming instructors offering western and English lessons, trail rides, and camps for all ages on an 18-acre property near Austin.

name: Tri-Star Farm
description: At Tri-Star Farm, the mission is to bring the love of horses into the hearts of both new and developing riders. Located on Spicewood Springs Road in Austin, the farm offers riding lessons and boarding for all levels, weekly trail rides, summer programs, and birthday parties.

trainers.name: Tri-Star Farm Instructors
trainers.bio: Dedicated instructors offering riding lessons and training for all levels, with a focus on building a love of horses in new and developing riders.

name: ATX Polo
description: ATX Polo IS polo in Austin! Players of all ages and skill levels get together each week to play the game they love. Welcomes new players and spectators alike. Located at Victory Cheval in Manor, TX. For lessons and chukkers contact Javier Insua.

trainers.name: Javier Insua
trainers.bio: Head instructor at ATX Polo offering lessons and chukkers for players of all ages and skill levels.

name: Oak Bend Farm Polo Club
description: Oak Bend Farm is the home of polo in Central Texas, located one hour from both Austin and College Station and 90 minutes from Houston. Offers seasonal polo memberships, USPA tournaments, a Polo School, horse boarding, hay and horse sales, and vacation rentals including a Barn Loft and Clubhouse.

trainers.name: Oak Bend Farm Polo School
trainers.bio: Certified polo instructors teaching rules, game strategy, riding for polo, and swing mechanics to enable players to participate in club chukkers.

name: Augusta Pines Farm
description: Augusta Pines Farm is a premier full-service 33-acre show barn in Spring, TX bordering The Woodlands, specializing in Hunters, Jumpers, and Equitation.

name: Bailey Oaks Farms
description: The largest English equestrian riding and training center south of downtown Houston in Alvin, TX. Offers premier horseback riding lessons, camps, boarding, and training with a focus on hunter and jumper disciplines.

name: Bedoya Training Stables
description: Houston area's premier hunter/jumper training facility for those looking to compete on the 'A' circuit and beyond. Daniel Bedoya is a veteran of both the World Cup and Olympics.

trainers.name: Daniel Bedoya
trainers.bio: Olympic and World Cup veteran offering premier hunter/jumper training at the 'A' circuit level and beyond.

name: Blackjack Lane Equestrian
description: Competitive English full-service riding lesson, boarding and training barn in Southeast Houston specializing in Hunter, Jumper, Equitation and Dressage for beginners through advanced riders.

name: BlissWood Ranch
description: A 350-acre bed and breakfast dude ranch just one hour west of Houston in Cat Spring, TX. Offers guided trail rides, winery rides, picnics, ranch activities, and unique lodging experiences in the Texas countryside.

name: Blue Fox Farms
description: A dressage facility located at 14801 Old Chocolate Bayou Rd in Houston, TX.

name: Callegari Equestrian Center
description: A premier equestrian facility in Cypress, TX offering boarding, training and riding instruction. Prides itself on being more of a club than an average boarding facility, with a close-knit community of riders.

name: Cypress Trails Ranch
description: Equine riding and training facility in Humble, TX offering gorgeous countryside trail rides, horse boarding with pasture living, parties, and events.

name: Haras dos Cavaleiros
description: Elite Lusitano horse breeding, training, sales and equestrian experiences in dressage, located in Magnolia, TX just north of Houston. Training center open to outside horses.

name: Houston Oaks Equestrian Club
description: The Equestrian Club at Houston Oaks consists of 500 acres of pristine pastures in Hockley, TX with exceptional opportunities for boarding, lessons, training, and horseback riding.

name: Houston Polo Club
description: The largest polo club in the United States, founded in Houston, TX. Located at 8552 Memorial Drive, the club promotes the sport of polo and is private but open to the public on Sundays.

description: Full-service boarding and training facility in West Houston near the Katy Freeway and Wilcrest. Horseback riding school with a focus on Dressage and Western Dressage from beginner to nationally competitive levels.

name: Pine Hollow Farm
description: A unique horse-friendly facility on 30 quiet, lush acres in New Caney, TX for prime Hunter/Jumper show preparation and casual enjoyment.

name: Ride the Wind Stables
description: A western horse riding and boarding facility in Rosenberg, TX on 27 acres, 5 miles southwest of Sugar Land. Offering western lessons and boarding in a relaxed ranch setting.

name: S4 Farm
description: S4 Farm proudly offers hunter-jumper lessons and full training at their Harris County equestrian facility in Hockley, TX. Program designed for every rider.

name: Sobral Performance Horses
description: Located north of Houston near The Woodlands in Montgomery, TX. Specializes in western horse riding lessons and horse training including reining.

name: Sundance Horse Ranch

name: WA Farm
description: WA Farm is the ultimate full-service show barn for Hunters and Jumpers in Tomball, TX. Boards and trains horses and ponies from Walk/Trot through Grand Prix.

name: West Stables
description: Located in Cypress, TX off Highway 290. Offers full and partial horse boarding with stall and pasture options. Riding lessons and trails also available.

name: Brookshire Polo Club
description: Brookshire Polo Club is an active polo club located in Brookshire, TX, approximately 35 miles west of Houston. Home to the Texas Arena League and USPA-sanctioned tournaments including the Keleen & Carlton Beal Cup.

name: 4Hearts Ranch
description: Warm equestrian-friendly boarding facility in Fort Worth featuring indoor and outdoor arenas, trails, and spacious stalls. Offering boarding, lessons, and training.

name: Benbrook Stables
description: Benbrook Stables offers trail rides, horseback riding lessons, and summer camps near Fort Worth. A great family-friendly equestrian destination.

name: Black Star Sport Horses
description: Black Star Sport Horses specializes in dressage training and boarding in Waxahachie, Texas. Offering quality sport horse education at all levels.

name: Brawley Farms
description: Brawley Farms is a premier hunter/jumper facility in Double Oak, Texas offering top-level training, boarding, and showing for horses and riders of all levels.

name: Dallas Equestrian Center
description: Dallas Equestrian Center provides boarding, lessons, and training for dressage, hunter/jumper, and western disciplines in the heart of Dallas.

name: Dallas Polo Club
description: The Dallas Polo Club hosts regular polo matches and offers polo lessons for players of all skill levels near Dallas, Texas.

name: Flower Mound Farm
description: Flower Mound Farm is a hunter/jumper and eventing facility in Flower Mound, Texas offering quality training, boarding, and competition preparation.

name: Fort Worth Stockyard Stables
description: Fort Worth Stockyard Stables offers western trail rides through the historic Fort Worth Stockyards, providing a true Texas cowboy experience.

name: Whistlejacket Farm

name: Comly Sport Horses
description: Comly Sport Horses specializes in hunter/jumper and eventing training in Wills Point, Texas with boarding and professional coaching services.

name: Hillcrest Farm
description: Hillcrest Farm in Argyle, Texas is a full-service dressage and hunter/jumper facility offering top-quality boarding, training, and lessons.

name: Marshall Creek Ranch
description: Marshall Creek Ranch in Southlake offers trail rides and western horsemanship in a scenic Texas landscape, perfect for beginners and experienced riders alike.

name: North Texas Equestrian Center
description: North Texas Equestrian Center in Wylie is a premier English and western riding facility offering lessons, boarding, and training for all disciplines.

name: Prestonwood Polo Club
description: Prestonwood Polo Club in Oak Point, Texas offers polo lessons, clinics, and matches in a beautiful North Texas setting.

name: RNR Stables
description: RNR Stables in Corinth, Texas provides full equestrian services including boarding, lessons, and training for western, trail, and hunter/jumper riders.

name: Rocking J Stables
description: Rocking J Stables in Garland offers a full range of equestrian services for DFW riders including western riding, hunter/jumper training, and trail riding.

name: Stockyards Stables
description: Stockyards Stables at the historic Fort Worth Stockyards offers authentic western trail rides through the iconic stockyards district.

name: Three Oaks Equestrian
description: Three Oaks Equestrian in North Richland Hills offers dressage and hunter/jumper training with quality boarding facilities in the DFW area.

name: Touch of Chrome Paints
description: Touch of Chrome Paints in Crowley, Texas offers western horseback riding lessons, trail rides, and quality Paint horse services.

name: Willow Bend Polo Club
description: Willow Bend Polo Club in Little Elm, Texas offers polo lessons, matches, and memberships in a premier North Texas polo environment.

name: Spring Creek Stables
description: Spring Creek Stables offers quality, well-trained lesson horses and full-care boarding in San Antonio. With daily on-site staff, riders can haul in their own horse for lessons or use the arena for just $25/hour. A friendly, professional facility located in the scenic northwest San Antonio area.

name: Oak Valley Stables
description: Oak Valley Stables is a highly-rated equestrian facility in San Antonio offering horseback riding lessons and boarding. Known for kind, patient, and skilled instructors, the stable provides a welcoming environment for riders of all experience levels.

name: Turkey Creek Stables
description: Established in 1988, Turkey Creek Stables is a family-run equestrian facility cultivating a safe and enjoyable environment for the budding equestrian.

name: Oakwell Farms
description: Oakwell Farms is San Antonio's stable for the competitive rider seeking "A" rated competitions for the Hunters, Jumpers and Equitation. Operating over 10 acres with scenic woodland views, this family business brings over 60 years of experience and marked 40 years in San Antonio in 2024.

name: Wrenwood Stables
description: Nestled at the base of the stunning Texas Hill Country, Wrenwood Farms and Stables offers a peaceful and quiet equestrian facility known for excellence in care, nutrition, breeding, sales and training.

trainers.name: Rene' Riddle
trainers.bio: Owner/Operator with over 40 years of horse care experience. Certified in Equine Nutrition, Equine Biomechanics, and Horsemanship Training. Multiple US National and international championship titles.

name: Double Diamond Equestrian Center
description: Double Diamond Equestrian Center is a paradise for horses nestled in the Texas Hill Country near San Antonio. Spanning 180+ acres featuring mature trees, manicured grounds, and miles of pipe fencing for pastures, paddocks, and pens.

name: Diamond C Stables
description: For over 25 years, Diamond C Stables & Ranch has been a trusted choice for high-quality, affordable horse boarding and training in a family-friendly environment in the Texas Hill Country near San Antonio.

trainers.name: Debbie Culver
trainers.bio: Owner of Diamond C Stables & Ranch with over 25 years of experience in horse boarding and training.

name: Blueberry Creek Stables
description: of Hungerford Performance Horses, Blueberry Creek Stables offers lessons and training services for riders of all skill levels with a focus on horsemanship fundamentals.

name: Driftwood Acres Barn
description: A family-friendly equestrian facility in the Texas Hill Country offering boarding, lessons, and recreational riding. The establishment aims to provide a first class facility with a laid back atmosphere where people can just unwind and enjoy their horses.

name: Doringcourt Horse Boarding Stables
description: Family-oriented horse boarding facility established 2004, situated in the Texas Hill Country with a serene environment for equine enthusiasts. Located in Bulverde between FM 1863 and Hwy 46 on Smithson Valley Road, approximately 10 miles north of San Antonio.

name: Bel Canto Farms
description: Premier equestrian facility offering full-service horse boarding, training, and lessons in the beautiful Hill Country of Texas near Wimberley. The operation emphasizes quality training steeped in the traditions of true horsemanship and sport.

name: Hunters Chase Farms
description: A horseback riding school situated in the Texas Hill Country near Wimberley offering instruction from beginner to advanced levels. The facility emphasizes leadership, teamwork, and discipline through equestrian training.

trainers.name: Marley
trainers.bio: Instructor and contact at Hunters Chase Farms, leading a competitive show team across Texas.

name: Hill Country Equestrian Lodge
description: Located at a historic ranch headquarters adjoining a 5,500-acre natural area in Bandera, Texas — the Cowboy Capital of the World. The facility spans 6,000 acres with miles of trails through rugged Texas Hill Country terrain.

name: Bit and Bridle Stables
description: A ranch in the beautiful Texas Hill Country near Harper, TX offering privately scheduled trail rides, private lessons, and equine therapy. Family-friendly with experienced, patient instructors. Instruction available from beginner through advanced levels including bareback riding.

trainers.name: Tim
trainers.bio: Owner and instructor known for welcoming demeanor and experience with riders of all levels.

trainers.name: Vanessa
trainers.bio: Owner and instructor praised for patience and teaching ability, specializing in beginner through advanced lessons.

name: Red Horse Ranch
description: A family-operated boarding facility in Dripping Springs where horses have large pens with plenty of room to run and play, lots of trees for shade, and large run-in barns. Owners Dave and Lisa Bierbower personally care for all horses.

name: Trails of Horseshoe Bay Equestrian Center
description: A world class equestrian center in the heart of Texas Hill Country at Horseshoe Bay on Lake LBJ. Features a professional exercise arena, round pen, stables, and access to an extensive trail system.

name: Lobos Horse Ranch & Stables
description: Lobos Horse Ranch & Stables provides full-care, self-care, and partial-care horse boarding located near Fort Worth, Dallas, Arlington, and Burleson in the Dallas-Fort Worth area.

name: White Rock Stables
description: White Rock Stables offers exclusive full care horse boarding nestled in the beautiful Lake Highlands foothills surrounded by more than 350 acres of pastoral trails. The beautiful 14-acre ranch near Flag Pole Hill and within a mile north of White Rock Lake has been in operation for over 90 years.

trainers.name: Julie Rentfro Wilson
trainers.bio: Julie Rentfro Wilson started riding at White Rock Stables before she could walk. Her mother boarded horses at White Rock, so the love of horses was inherited at an early age.

name: Southlake Equestrian
description: Southlake Equestrian is a premiere equestrian facility in Southlake, TX offering riding lessons, competition equestrian training, and horse boarding serving the Dallas, Fort Worth, and DFW region.

name: Summer Hill Farms
description: Summer Hill Farms is a full-service hunter/jumper riding program located in Flower Mound, TX, dedicated to providing quality equestrian experiences. The facility is staffed by professional coaches committed to developing young horses and new riders into competitive athletes.

name: Monarch Stables Austin
description: Monarch Stables offers a fresh approach to hunter jumper training and instruction for all levels of riders, and full service boarding for our equine partners. Located on 56 acres, 13 miles from downtown Austin along tree-lined Onion Creek.

trainers.name: Kalli Smith
trainers.bio: Specializes in correct flat work in developing finished show horses and skillful child and adult riders.

trainers.name: Amy Gangstad
trainers.bio: Focused on hunter jumper training for all levels of riders.

name: Coraggio Equestrian
description: Hunter/Jumper barn in Austin, Texas Hill Country, specializing in a personalized training program for you and your horse in a private, relaxed atmosphere. Features a lighted 250x150 outdoor arena, 75x75 covered arena, and 100+ acres of shaded trails with ride-out access to Jester King Brewery.

name: Paul Cates Stable
description: Family owned and operated stable of American Saddlebred Horses offering training, riding lessons, boarding, sales, and stud & foal services. The greater Austin area's premier Saddleseat training and lesson stable, serving Cedar Park, Leander, Georgetown, and Hutto.

trainers.name: Paul Cates
trainers.bio: Professional trainer since 1987, specializing in American Saddlebred horses and riders for competition.

name: Guarded Heart Farm
description: Guarded Heart Farm Horse Boarding & Equestrian Center is a 35-acre property convenient to Austin, Georgetown, Cedar Park, Hutto and Round Rock—approximately 10 minutes from the Williamson County Expo Center. Features a spring-fed pond, on-site barn manager, and 24/7 monitoring.

name: Highland Park Riding School
description: An all-women's equestrian sanctuary focused on English Hunter/Jumper riding. A space where women can grow in strength, confidence, and connection—both with each other and with horses. Features compassionate, highly trained instructors in a safe, supportive environment for women 30+.

name: Esoteric Farm
description: A Boutique Equestrian Training Center offering full care Hunter Jumper boarding in NE Austin. Serving Austin, Pflugerville, Westlake, Round Rock, Cedar Park, Manor, Leander, and Lakeway. USEF, USHJA, and THJA affiliated.

trainers.name: Kersten Levine
trainers.bio: Head Trainer. Started riding at age two in Hawaii. Qualified for pony finals by age 11 and has competed at state, national, and international Grand Prix levels. Founded Esoteric Farm in 2013. Her Grand Prix horse Entrepreneur won the World Cup series for the Pacific League.

trainers.name: Nancy Ansley
trainers.bio: Trainer and Barn Manager. Multiple state championships through the Arizona Horse Exhibitors Association. Competed at the National Medal Finals at Harrisburg and the Washington International Horse Show. Holds a Doctorate in Veterinary Medicine from Auburn University.

name: Silver Oak Stable
description: A 26-acre private boarding facility located on the North Shore of Long Island, New York, offering hunters/jumpers training in a comfortable, relaxed, high-quality environment.

name: Gold Coast Equestrian
description: A premier 76-stall equestrian facility in Old Brookville, Long Island, equipped with one of the largest indoor arenas in Nassau County, two outdoor arenas, and top-notch lesson and training programs. Offers boarding, riding lessons, sales, leasing, horse showing, and IEA competition.

name: Bethpage Equestrian Center
description: A full-service equestrian facility adjacent to the beautiful Bethpage State Park on Long Island, offering horse boarding and training in both Western and English styles, along with a wide array of programs for children and adults including riding lessons, trail rides, barrel practices, day camps, and pony parties.

name: New York Equestrian Center
description: A facility with nearly 100 years of history originally built in the 1920s, located adjacent to the 775-acre Hempstead Lake State Park in West Hempstead. Offers horseback riding lessons, trail rides, summer camp, after-school programs, pony parties, and equine studies curriculum.

name: North Shore Equestrian Center
description: The premier equestrian center on the north shore of Long Island for learning how to ride horses, featuring beautiful modern stalls, breathtaking grounds, and top instructors. Home to the LIU NCAA Equestrian Team and partners with multiple Long Island summer camps and LIU Veterinary School.

name: Choya Farms
description: Designed to be a sanctuary for horses and people alike in Manorville, New York, Choya Farms offers full board options, barns for rent, an indoor arena, riding lessons for all levels, and horse training.

name: Skye Acres Equestrian Center
description: Equestrian training and sales facility on 12 perfect acres nestled in eastern Long Island in East Patchogue. Offers horse boarding, training, lessons, leasing, and sales. Open seven days a week from 7am to 10pm to serve boarders and students across all skill levels.

name: Gray Horse Farm Hamptons
description: Founded in 2001, GHF Hamptons is a full-service show barn on a 115-acre premier facility in Bridgehampton featuring two indoor rings, three outdoor sand rings, a Grand Prix field, a polo field, and top-of-the-line footing.

name: Stony Hill Stables
description: A USHJA-recognized, state-of-the-art equestrian facility established over 60 years ago in Amagansett, just a mile from the ocean. Operated by the Hotchkiss family and specializing in dressage, hunter, and jumper disciplines.

name: Longacre MB
description: Nestled in the picturesque landscape of Bridgehampton South in Water Mill, Longacre MB Equestrian Center offers an unparalleled experience for horse enthusiasts of all ages.

name: Razor Creek Stables
description: A full board facility located in the J-town area of Louisville, offering a warm and friendly atmosphere to riders and boarders of all ages and experience levels. Horses are turned out 6 days a week weather permitting, with twice-daily hay and grain feeding using homegrown hay and 12% sweet feed.

name: Spring Run Farm
description: A small, family-oriented barn in Prospect, KY specializing in dressage, eventing, show jumping, cross country, basic hunt seat, equitation, and jumping. Home to approximately 70 horses across five barns with hundreds of acres of trails and fields.

trainers.name: Susan L. Perellis
trainers.bio: Teaching since the early 1970s, A-level Pony Club graduate and national examiner. Competed through Grand Prix dressage and 3-day events including Rolex and Radnor. Level IV Pony Club Examiner, Level III USEF Eventing Instructor, and USEF Dressage Instructor through 4th Level.

trainers.name: Sam McLean
trainers.bio: Competed in hunter/jumpers through high school in upstate New York. Joined Spring Run Farm in 2017. Currently competing at training level eventing.

name: Louisville Equestrian Center
description: Louisville's premier full-service equestrian facility with 78 matted stalls, offering riding lessons, boarding, horse sales, summer camps, pony parties, and horse show services.

trainers.name: Don Bridges
trainers.bio: Director of Training at Louisville Equestrian Center, overseeing customized daily care and training programs for boarding and training clients.

name: Bannon Woods Farm
description: A private hunter/jumper facility in southern Louisville owned and operated by the Denzik family. The beautiful 41-acre farm is surrounded by 5,000 acres of Jefferson County Forest, offering miles of trails, spacious indoor and outdoor arenas for year-round riding and training.

name: Rock Creek Riding Club
description: Louisville's historic riding club established in 1929, dedicated to teaching horsemanship and promoting educational opportunities involving horses, horseback riding, and horse showing. Located across from Seneca Park on 7 acres of the original 37-acre property with a Victorian clubhouse.

name: Temple Equestrian Center
description: A full-service horse boarding and care facility in Oldham County, Kentucky offering boarding, training, riding lessons, horse sales, and trail riding on 2,500 acres of trails and farmland. Horses receive customized training and five-star treatment with daily care and 24-hour video surveillance.

name: Circle G Stables
description: Tucked away in a private yet convenient centrally located picturesque setting in Shelby County, Kentucky. A beautiful, serene, comfortable, and enjoyable environment for you and your horse friends, where horses and riders are treated like family.

name: Miron Equine Center
description: Located in the heart of Simpsonville, Kentucky, Miron Equine Center provides world-class care for horses with a clients-first, integrity-driven approach. Specializing in broodmare care, foaling services, rehabilitation, show and sport horse boarding, and retirement services.

name: The Farm at Grace Hill
description: A Kentucky farm and horse boarding facility in Crestwood offering large stalls, paddocks, and a round pen with on-site owner supervision. Located approximately 1 mile from I-71 near Louisville. The farm also offers life coaching and equine-assisted coaching experiences. No stallions accepted.

trainers.name: Jessica Wuchterl
trainers.bio: Owner of The Farm at Grace Hill with over two decades of business experience. Equine-assisted life coach who uses horses as mirrors for human behavior and transformation. Daughter of an equine veterinarian.

name: Circle Bar C Ranch
description: For over 20 years, Circle Bar C Ranch has been building a top-tier training and boarding facility in La Grange, Kentucky.

name: River Chase Farm
description: River Chase Farm is a full-service equestrian facility in the heart of picturesque Northern Virginia horse country. The farm offers full-service horse boarding, training, and instruction from a team of passionate trainers.

name: Orchard Manor Show Stables
description: Orchard Manor Show Stables is a premier Hunter/Jumper/Equitation boarding, training, and showing facility situated on a beautiful historic 35-acre equestrian estate in the heart of Leesburg, Virginia.

name: Cavallo Farm
description: Cavallo Farm is a boarding facility specializing in Hunter/Jumper training, located just five minutes from the Brambleton Town Center and minutes from the Dulles Toll Road and Route 50.

name: Clairvaux
description: Clairvaux is a full-service Hunter/Jumper riding academy and show stable in Northern Virginia where equestrian dreams take flight. The facility fosters a supportive community where riders of all skill levels develop lasting connections through their shared passion for horses.

name: Morven Park International Equestrian Center
description: Morven Park International Equestrian Center is a premier competition venue serving all levels of competition from beginners to some of the world's top riders.

name: Picturesque Farm
description: Picturesque Farm is a 36-acre equestrian facility situated on the south side of Warrenton, Virginia.

name: MSF Equestrians
description: MSF Equestrians LLC is based out of Black Horse Farm and Stables at the historic Ashland Farm in Warrenton, Virginia. The property features an indoor arena, outdoor arena, and miles of beautiful trails in the Warrenton Hunt territory.

name: Foxrock Stables
description: Foxrock Stables offers instruction by award-winning trainers and traditional equine accommodations conveniently located in Middleburg, Virginia.

name: Wellington Equestrian Center Inc
description: State of the art equestrian center in Wellington, FL with complete infrastructure and high technology for horses, riders, trainers, and grooms.

name: Casperey Stables
description: Operating since 1982, Casperey Stables emphasizes quality horse boarding and excellent care with customizable boarding options designed around the safety, care, and comfort of the horses.

name: IDA Farm
description: Located in Wellington, Florida — the Equestrian Capital of the World — IDA Farm provides professional equestrian training and boarding in a relaxed yet professional atmosphere. The 22.5-acre facility welcomes riders of all levels in jumping and dressage disciplines.

trainers.name: Lauren Knopp
trainers.bio: FEI Dressage Trainer specializing in Young Riders programs.

name: Diamante Farms Dressage
description: Nestled in the heart of Wellington, Florida's equestrian capital, Diamante Farms is a newly designed, state-of-the-art dressage facility spanning 20 acres. Founded by owner Terri Kane, the facility emphasizes equine excellence and serves competitive Grand Prix riders and amateur enthusiasts alike.

trainers.name: Terri Kane
trainers.bio: Owner and visionary leader of Diamante Farms with a focus on dressage excellence.

trainers.name: Devon Kane
trainers.bio: Dressage trainer at Diamante Farms.

trainers.name: Kevin Kohmann
trainers.bio: International dressage competitor and trainer at Diamante Farms.

name: Top Gallant Farms
description: A private, peaceful, hurricane-safe barn just 15 minutes from WEF offering dry, partial, and full care boarding for the 2025-26 season or annual.

name: Poinciana Farm
description: A private dressage training center located on C Road in Loxahatchee Groves, this 13-acre horse park sets a new standard in dressage horse boarding. Horses' health and happiness, facility care, and maintaining a pleasant environment for equine and human clients are the priorities.

name: Invictus Farms FL
description: Invictus Farm is a private equestrian facility located in a gated equestrian community just 15 minutes from the Winter Equestrian Festival (WEF), Global Dressage Facility, and International Polo Club. The 5-acre farm offers boarding, training, and lessons in dressage and hunter/jumper disciplines.

name: Palm Beach Equine Sports Complex
description: Wellington's Premier Sport Horse Destination on 47 acres with large stalls and 6 arenas, located strides from WEF and AGDF. The facility is committed to providing the perfect conditions and atmosphere that help riders reach their equestrian goals.

name: Raven Ridge Farm
description: Raven Ridge Farm is an equestrian facility dedicated to providing a safe, high-end space for horse boarding, care, and training.

name: GNC Farm
description: GNC Farm was designed with both horses and riders in mind, featuring a barn with 30-foot ceilings for optimal airflow and natural light and spacious 16-foot-wide aisles. A Nordic-inspired luxury design with Saratoga European stall fronts.

name: HaddenLoch
description: HaddenLoch is a premier hunter/jumper boarding and training facility established in 1994, located minutes from Ponte Vedra Beach, Nocatee, and St. Augustine.

name: Diamond D Boarding Stables
description: Diamond D Boarding Stables is a well-established horse boarding facility in Jacksonville, Florida, offering quality care and boarding services for horses in a peaceful country setting. The stable provides a welcoming environment for horses and their owners in the Northeast Florida region.

name: Hidden Fields Private Stable
description: Hidden Fields Private Stable is a family-run equestrian facility in Jacksonville, Florida, owned by Debbie Field.

name: Jacksonville Equestrian Center
description: Jacksonville Equestrian Center is Florida's premier equestrian venue, hosting USEF and USHJA-sanctioned horse shows, tournaments, and community events year-round.

name: Coriander Farm
description: Coriander Farm is Jacksonville's leading riding school, offering hunter/jumper instruction for all levels from beginner through national show competition.

name: Windemere Equestrian Center
description: Windemere Equestrian Center is an 18-acre full-service show, lesson, breeding, and boarding facility in Jacksonville established in 1994.

name: La Rose Performance Horses
description: La Rose Performance Horses is a comprehensive equestrian facility established in 2012, situated on 3105 CR 121 in Jacksonville, forty minutes from the beaches and fifteen minutes from the Jacksonville Equestrian Center.

name: BV Equestrian Show Stables
description: BV Equestrian Show Stables is a premier hunter/jumper training and show facility located on 20 acres in St. Augustine.

name: M & M Hunter Jumpers
description: M & M Hunter Jumpers is a boutique-style hunter/jumper training stable in St. Augustine run by Michelle Moen, who brings over 30 years of hunter/jumper experience.

name: Southern Pines Equestrian Center
description: Southern Pines Equestrian Center is a 30-acre equestrian facility in St. Augustine offering English and Western riding instruction for all ages and experience levels.

name: Bella Cavalli Farms & Vineyard
description: A 50-acre French Country-style equestrian estate in the Santa Ynez Valley, just west of Solvang. Bella Cavalli offers full boarding, pasturing, and a renowned lay-up, rehabilitation, and reconditioning center for horses recovering from demanding activities.

name: Happy N Ranch
description: Located in the Santa Ynez Valley between Buellton and Solvang, Happy N Ranch is a retirement, rehabilitation, and pasture care facility established over 33 years ago.

name: California Horse Center
description: Situated at the historic Flag Is Up Farms in Solvang, California Horse Center is a premier boarding and training facility rooted in Monty Roberts' natural horsemanship philosophy.

name: Black Mountain Sport Horses
description: Black Mountain Sport Horses is a dedicated hunter-jumper training facility in Santa Barbara specializing in developing riders and horses from first lessons to national-level Grand Prix competition.

name: Westerly Stud Farm & Equestrian Center
description: A historic 250-acre property in the heart of the Santa Ynez Valley offering premier boarding, training, rehabilitation, lay-up, young horse programs, and retirement services.

name: Santa Barbara Stables
description: Nestled on Hilltop Ranch, a breathtaking 350-acre avocado estate in Carpinteria with panoramic Pacific Ocean views, Santa Barbara Stables is a premier West Coast training and boarding facility.

name: Friend's Stable & Orchard
description: A small, private horse boarding facility tucked within one of Ojai's historic citrus orchards, Friend's Stable & Orchard offers a peaceful and secluded environment for show horses, trail horses, arena companions, and retired equines alike.

name: Canty Rune Training Stables
description: Located in Oak View alongside San Antonio Creek with stunning mountain views, Canty Rune Training Stables is run by the dynamic duo of Laurie May Canty and Sarah Rune.

name: The Stable On The Woods
description: Aiken's elite boarding and training facility set on 70 acres with a 26-stall courtyard-style barn. Offers customized programs in dressage, hunter/jumper, eventing, and foxhunting, with direct access to the famous 2,000-acre Hitchcock Woods trail system.

name: The Stables at New Bridge Polo
description: A full-service equestrian boarding facility within the New Bridge Polo & Country Club. Features a 24-stall center aisle barn with 12x12 matted stalls, fans, and a fly spray system.

name: Magnolia Meadow Stables
description: A full-service equestrian facility on 30 private acres within the Bridle Creek Equestrian Community in Aiken, SC.

name: Jumping Branch Farm
description: A premier eventing training facility on 100+ acres in Aiken, SC, surrounded by trees, trails, and two ponds with large turnout fields. Best known for its Starter through Preliminary cross-country courses that are inviting yet challenging.

name: DFG Stables
description: A professional hunter/jumper training and boarding facility operated by USEF National Equestrian of the Year Daniel Geitner, located in the heart of Aiken, SC.

name: Ligara Farm
description: A beautifully maintained boarding facility on 24 acres in the horse-rich 302 corridor of Aiken, SC. Offers full and self-care stall options as well as pasture board. Features 8 fully matted stalls, a hot water wash rack, jumps, perimeter riding track, and trails — just 8 miles from Hitchcock Woods.

name: Vaughn Equestrian
description: A holistic equestrian facility in Aiken, SC focused on the well-being of horse and rider. With over 55 years of combined staff experience, Vaughn Equestrian offers boarding, dressage training, jump training, and retraining projects, as well as equine Reiki massage healing.

name: Red Horse Stables
description: An eventing and dressage barn located within the Wire Road Polo Association in Aiken, SC. The main barn features six 12x12 matted stalls with a tack room, hot water wash stall, and washer/dryer, plus a lower barn with two additional stalls. Full board starts at $775/month.

name: Kelsey Farm
description: A beloved family barn in the backcountry of Greenwich, established in 1949. Kelsey Farm offers horseback riding lessons, full boarding, a shared pony program, summer camp, and showing for riders of all ages and levels.

name: Mead Farm
description: One of Connecticut's oldest equestrian establishments, Mead Farm has been welcoming riders to its Stamford property since 1928.

name: Silvermine Farm
description: A full-service Hunter/Jumper show stable nestled in the heart of Norwalk's historic Silvermine neighborhood. Silvermine Farm offers lessons, full-care boarding, leases, sales, and a competitive IEA Team for school-age riders.

name: Fairfield County Hunt Club
description: A nationally recognized private equestrian country club in Westport, Connecticut, offering a world-class hunter/jumper program for riders from beginners to high-level competitors.

name: Serenity Show Stable
description: A full-service show stable located on the historic 53-acre Marchant Farm property in Redding, Connecticut. Serenity Show Stable offers training and lessons for riders of all levels, from beginners through competitors at prestigious AA-rated horse shows nationwide.

name: Sunset Hill Farm Equestrian Center
description: A privately owned equestrian boarding stable located in the picturesque countryside of Redding, Connecticut. Sunset Hill Farm Equestrian Center provides boarding and riding services in a serene rural setting, offering personalized horse care and a welcoming community for horse owners and riders.

name: Whimsy Brook Farm
description: A holistic equestrian facility in Redding, Connecticut, operating since 1972 under the philosophy of "Where Science and Horsemanship Join Up." Whimsy Brook Farm offers full-service horse boarding, riding instruction in hunt seat, dressage, and western disciplines, horse training, and U.S.

name: Memory Lane Farm
description: A charming Greenwich equestrian facility situated directly on the Greenwich Riding Trails, offering horseback riding lessons, a kids summer riding program, and cart driving instruction.

name: Los Angeles Equestrian Center
description: The Los Angeles Equestrian Center is a premier 75-acre equestrian facility in Burbank with over 44 years of history.

name: J. Bennett Farms
description: Founded in 1984, J. Bennett Farms is one of the largest stables at the Los Angeles Equestrian Center and the LA home of the American Saddlebred. The farm specializes in Saddle Seat and Western disciplines along with horse driving, and is a premier destination for Saddlebred enthusiasts.

name: The Paddock Riding Club
description: Established in 1987, The Paddock Riding Club is a family-owned premier equestrian center in Los Angeles, adjacent to Griffith Park and its 55 miles of horse trails.

name: Courtship Ranch
description: In continuous boarding operation since the 1970s, Courtship Ranch is a renowned Shadow Hills facility offering top-quality horse care at affordable prices. Situated backing up to the Angeles National Forest, the ranch provides direct access to over 800 miles of protected riding trails.

name: Farndale Stables
description: Farndale Stables is a full-service training barn located at the Los Angeles Equestrian Center in Burbank, specializing in hunters, jumpers, and equitation.

name: Stoney Point Ranch
description: Stoney Point Ranch is a full-service equestrian center in Chatsworth, nestled near the iconic Stoney Point rock formations and the Santa Susana Mountains. Owner Angel Rodriguez brings nearly 30 years of experience prioritizing horse safety and care.

name: Mountain Meadows Stables
description: Mountain Meadows Stables is a family-oriented, full-service horse boarding facility set on over 20 acres of landscaped grounds two miles up a scenic canyon road in the west San Fernando Valley.

name: Pepper Tree Ranch
description: Serving the San Fernando Valley since 1988, Pepper Tree Ranch is a well-established equestrian facility in Chatsworth offering horse boarding, riding lessons, lease options, and training.

name: WhiteOak Ranch Chatsworth
description: WhiteOak Ranch is a picturesque horse boarding facility nestled at the base of the Santa Susana Mountains near Stoney Point and the Garden of the Gods in Chatsworth.

name: Bell Canyon Equestrian Center
description: Nestled in the rolling Simi Hills, Bell Canyon Equestrian Center is one of the few remaining full-service equestrian centers in the San Fernando Valley.

name: Shangri-La Farm Equine
description: Located in Morriston, FL on 115 acres, Shangri-La Farm offers horse boarding and breeding options for all breeds and disciplines. Services include full board, pasture and retirement board, breeding and foaling out, rehab, and stud services.

name: Big Iron Farm
description: Located 15 miles from Ocala in Citra, FL, Big Iron Farm is a 26-acre full-care facility with a laid-back, welcoming atmosphere and live-in staff. The team specializes in caring for performance horses through the upper levels of sport, with experience in FEI grooming and barn management.

name: Eden Farm
description: Established in 1972, Eden Farm is one of the oldest hunter/jumper barns in Ocala/Marion County, Florida. Located just minutes from local schools, the farm offers English riding lessons and training for equestrians participating in competitive show jumping.

name: Lazy J Farm
description: Lazy J Farm is a horse boarding facility in the heart of Northwest Ocala, just minutes from the World Equestrian Center and HITS. The facility accepts all varieties of horses except stallions and is backed by 50+ years of combined owner experience.

name: Five Phases Farm
description: Five Phases Farm is situated on 60 acres in Ocala, FL at Epona Equine Center, 10 minutes from both the World Equestrian Center and HITS Show Grounds.

trainers.name: Michelle Warro
trainers.bio: Three-day eventer

name: SilverStride Equestrian Center
description: SilverStride Equestrian Center provides a warm and welcoming environment where inseparable bonds between human and horse can blossom into success.

trainers.name: Brie Seltser
trainers.bio: Owner and trainer at SilverStride Equestrian Center, specializing in hunter/jumper and eventing.

name: BREC Dressage
description: BREC Dressage is situated on 35 beautifully manicured acres north of Ocala, FL, and is one of the area's best equestrian training centers. Offering classical dressage training from Training Level through FEI with full-care boarding and 24/7 care.

trainers.name: Tyra Vernon
trainers.bio: FEI-level trainer, USDF Bronze, Silver and Gold medalist, Regional Champion with 15+ years operating BREC Dressage. Trains from Training Level through FEI.

trainers.name: Kerryann Schade
trainers.bio: Co-trainer at BREC Dressage specializing in dressage.

name: Sapphire Equestrian
description: Sapphire Equestrian at Zafiro Farms is a full-service boarding and training facility located on 30 acres in scenic NW Marion County, FL, just minutes from the World Equestrian Center.

name: Olive Acres Equestrian Center
description: Olive Acres Equestrian Center is a family-owned, professionally managed equestrian facility offering full-care boarding and professional training focused on horse welfare, consistency, and long-term success. Located near World Equestrian Center and HITS in Ocala.

trainers.name: Madison Rose
trainers.bio: Head Trainer and Program Manager at Olive Acres Equestrian Center. Background in hunter/jumper training and competition as well as western disciplines. USEF Registered Jumper Judge with experience producing young horses, developing sale horses, and supporting competitive riders. Has qualified multiple horses for Young Horse Championships.

name: Ashcombe Sporthorses
description: Ashcombe Sporthorses, LLC brings over 30 years of experience developing horses and riders for sport in the hunter/jumper ring.

name: In The Breeze Ranch
description: In The Breeze Ranch is a full-service equestrian facility located in northwest Tampa on Gardner Road, offering boarding, lessons, trail riding, horse swimming, and special events.

name: Annwyn Equestrian Center
description: Annwyn Equestrian Center in Seffner, Florida is an elite dressage training facility established in 2009 by Susan Mitchell and Kathleen Petersen. Originally an elite boarding facility, Annwyn has evolved into one of the Tampa Bay area's premier dressage destinations.

name: Perennial Farm Riding Academy
description: Perennial Farm Riding Academy is a hunter jumper barn situated on the historic Tampa Yacht & Country Club property along Interbay Boulevard, where horses have roamed since the early 1900s.

name: Hidden Meadow Farms
description: Hidden Meadow Farms is a welcoming hunter jumper facility in Plant City, Florida, offering personalized riding instruction for riders aged 7 and up.

name: Suncoast Stables and Riding Academy
description: Suncoast Stables and Riding Academy, founded in 2007 by owner and trainer Krystle Lee, is a premier multi-discipline equestrian facility in Odessa, Florida.

name: Whispering Oaks Equestrian Center
description: Whispering Oaks Equestrian Center is a family-friendly facility on Gardner Road in Tampa, Florida, specializing in Morgan Performance Horses and welcoming all breeds.

name: Kingsmeade Farm
description: Kingsmeade Farm is Tampa Bay's premiere hunter jumper equestrian facility, nestled along a quiet country road in Lutz just 20 minutes from downtown Tampa.

name: Licciardello Stables
description: Licciardello Stables is a family-friendly equestrian facility in Lutz, Florida, specializing in American Saddlebreds, Morgans, and Hackneys with a focus on saddle seat riding and training.

name: Fire River 4 Ranch
description: Fire River 4 Ranch is a spacious horse boarding facility in Plant City, Florida, offering full board services across more than 120 acres of open pasture. The ranch accommodates small to large horse breeds in 10 private stalls, with daily care provided by on-site staff.

name: The Ranch at Cave Creek
description: The Ranch at Cave Creek is a full-service horse boarding facility set on scenic property in Cave Creek, Arizona. Offering large outdoor and covered arenas alongside attentive daily care, the facility provides a clean and welcoming environment for horses and their owners.

name: Sweetwater Stables
description: Sweetwater Stables is a hunter jumper training facility in Cave Creek, Arizona, offering programs for beginners through high-level competitive jumpers.

name: River Horse Ranch
description: River Horse Ranch, operated by Jennuine Horse LLC, is a Cave Creek boarding and training facility with a horse-first, mindful horsemanship philosophy. The ranch provides anti-inflammatory diet management, 12-hour daily turnout, and 24/7 slow-feeder hay access.

name: Desert Palms Equestrian Center
description: Desert Palms Equestrian Center in Cave Creek is a premier show horse training and boarding facility with 36 stalls, two large outdoor arenas, and a round pen. Owner and trainer Michelle Haisch is a USEF 'R' Judge specializing in American Saddlebred show horses.

name: Chaparosa Ranch
description: Chaparosa Ranch is a multi-discipline equestrian facility nestled in Rio Verde, North Scottsdale, just steps from the Tonto National Forest. The property features two riding arenas including one covered arena, individual and trainer barn options, and direct gate access to national forest trails.

name: Hawk Ranch Cave Creek
description: Hawk Ranch Cave Creek is a full-service Western equestrian facility in north Phoenix offering 32 stalls, two expansive riding arenas, a round pen, and access to miles of Arizona State Land and Cave Creek Preserve trails.

name: Twisted Tree Farm
description: Twisted Tree Farm has been a premier hunter/jumper training and boarding facility in Scottsdale since 1984. Head trainer Janet Hischer brings over 35 years of competitive experience at local, national, and international levels.

name: Serenity Stables
description: Serenity Stables is a full-service horse boarding facility in Chandler, Arizona, independently owned and operated since 2006.

name: Equine Connections
description: Equine Connections is a four-acre ranch in Gilbert, Arizona, offering horse boarding, riding lessons, equine-assisted learning, and community programs. Owner and equine specialist Virginia McCarthy emphasizes healing and personal growth through horses.

name: Kerivan Farms
description: Kerivan Farms is a fully equipped English riding facility in Gilbert, Arizona, specializing in hunter/jumper training, dressage, and IEA competition programs.

name: Suncoast Farms
description: Suncoast Farms is a 40-acre full-care horse boarding facility in San Diego's South Bay, in the Spurling family since 1977.

name: D & J Stables
description: D & J Stables is a family-run equestrian facility founded by Dick and Jenny Tynan in 2005, located on the Kimzey Family Ranch in South San Diego.

name: Canyonside Equestrian Center
description: Canyonside Equestrian Center, originally established as Horseman's Park in the early 1970s by Barbara Gerrior, is a non-profit premier riding, training, and boarding facility situated on 15.44 acres within the Los Penasquitos Canyon Preserve.

name: Sweetwater Farms
description: Sweetwater Farms is a community-oriented equestrian center in Bonita, California, welcoming riders of all ages and experience levels.

name: Windfall Ranch
description: Windfall Ranch is a drama-free equine boarding, training, and guided trail riding facility tucked in the San Diego mountains near Alpine.

name: River Valley Equestrian Center
description: River Valley Equestrian Center is a premier 40-acre horse boarding facility in Lakeside, California, offering a serene East County San Diego setting.

name: Poway Equestrian Center
description: Poway Equestrian Center is a full-service equestrian facility at 14875 Mina de Oro Road in Poway, California, operated by Nicole Stone.

name: Iron Oak Canyon Ranch
description: Iron Oak Canyon Ranch, formerly Bright Valley Farms, is an equestrian boarding facility in the scenic Sweetwater River Valley of Spring Valley, California.

name: Rancho Agave Equestrian
description: Rancho Agave Equestrian is a premier 60-acre facility in Valley Center, California, founded in 2022.

name: Two Mountains Farm
description: A 105-acre equestrian property nestled at the base of Novelty Hill in Carnation, Washington. Two Mountains Farm offers full boarding and clinic programs focused on dressage and eventing in a comfortable, safe environment designed for horses to thrive physically, mentally, and socially.

name: Villa Fleur de Lys Stables
description: A highly rated horse boarding stable in Maple Valley, Washington, offering full-care boarding on a mud-free property with year-round dry conditions. The facility provides direct access to Taylor Mountain's thousands of acres of trails, an outdoor arena, a large round pen, and a hot/cold wash rack.

name: Ravenswood Farm
description: A 25-acre multi-disciplinary equestrian facility in Issaquah, Washington, just 10 minutes from downtown Issaquah and under 30 minutes from Seattle.

name: Rockmeadow Equestrian Center
description: A renowned 30-year equestrian institution in Sammamish, Washington, dedicated to riders of all ages and abilities pursuing their passion for horses. Rockmeadow Equestrian Center is a premier hunter jumper facility offering training programs, riding school, summer camps, and school break programs.

name: Western Sky Equestrian Center
description: A secure-gate western horsemanship facility in Redmond, Washington, just minutes from downtown Redmond and the Redmond Watershed trails.

name: The Equestrian School PNW
description: A classical horsemanship school located at Patterson Creek Farm in Fall City, Washington, serving the greater Seattle area with over 25 years of experience.

name: Sharkey Farm
description: A 15-acre hunter jumper training facility on Snoqualmie Ridge, just two miles from Snoqualmie Parkway and 30 minutes from Seattle. Sharkey Farm offers boarding, lessons, IEA team participation, and co-op boarding options under the guidance of trainer Kate Sharkey.

name: Patterson Creek Equestrian Center
description: A 40-acre premier equestrian facility in Redmond, Washington, surrounded by miles of manicured trails. Patterson Creek Equestrian Center offers boarding, training, sales, and instruction for all levels of horses and riders, with dressage, jumping, and eventing as primary disciplines.

name: The Stables at Magnolia Ridge
description: A full-care, multi-discipline equestrian facility set on a stunning 40-acre property in Monroe, Washington, with sweeping views of the Cascade Mountains and Tualco Valley.

name: Rosebud River Ranch
description: A premiere full-service boarding, breeding, and training facility just 30 miles from downtown Seattle along the I-90 corridor in Snoqualmie, Washington.

name: Sisterhood Stables
description: Sisterhood Stables is a unique equestrian experience catering to women entrepreneurs and leaders, as well as clients whose horses need extra care and love.

name: Renovatio Farm
description: Renovatio Farm is a full-service boarding and training facility on 50+ acres nestled in the foothills of the Blue Ridge Mountains, less than a mile from Tryon International Equestrian Center.

name: Cherokee Hill Farm
description: Cherokee Hill Farm is a full-service 100-acre horse farm in Tryon, NC, serving Polk, Spartanburg, and Greenville Counties for over 36 years. The main barn features 25 box stalls and a 200-foot center aisle with hot water wash racks, while the lower barn adds 11 more stalls.

name: Foothills Equestrian Nature Center (FENCE)
description: The Foothills Equestrian Nature Center (FENCE) is one of the finest equestrian facilities in the Southeast, set on 384 protected acres in Tryon, NC.

name: Block House Sport Horses
description: Block House Sport Horses, operated by trainer Kelly Kocher at Finally Farm of Tryon, is a premier hunter/jumper training facility on 45 acres minutes from Tryon International Equestrian Center.

name: Still Creek Equine
description: Still Creek Farm in Columbus, NC, is a professional equine rehabilitation facility offering the highest standard of care in a productive and stress-free environment.

name: Serenity Acres
description: Serenity Acres has been a trusted horse boarding facility in the NC foothills since 1994, offering individualized care for horses of all ages in a safe and fun environment.

name: Dream Haven Farm
description: Dream Haven Farm in Columbus, NC, is a welcoming equestrian facility offering horse boarding and summer equestrian camp programs in the scenic Polk County foothills.

name: Cavallo Dreams Farm
description: A premium care, full service equestrian facility operating for 90+ years in Scarsdale, featuring the largest indoor ring in Westchester County. Offers lessons for all ages and levels, boarding, leasing, showing, summer camp, and party services with tailored programs for equine athletes and riders.

name: Trinity Equestrian Center
description: Located in Dutchess County near Germantown, Red Hook, Kingston, and Hudson, Trinity Equestrian Center is known for its well-trained riders and horses. The center provides a welcoming and well-equipped environment for riding, boarding, and training, with beginner riders of every age a specialty.

name: The Southlands Foundation
description: A 501(c)(3) nonprofit established in 1983 with barn facilities dating to 1938, situated on nearly 200 acres in Rhinebeck spanning approximately 90% conservation easement land managed with Scenic Hudson.

name: Juckas Riding Stables

name: Ellerslie Stable
description: A state-of-the-art equestrian facility on 650 acres with panoramic views of the Hudson River in Rhinebeck.

name: Old Salem Farm
description: A premier hunter-jumper facility on 120 acres in North Salem, Westchester County, featuring over 60 stalls, 2 indoor arenas, 4 outdoor riding rings, a Grand Prix field, boarders' lounge with gym, and spacious paddocks.

name: Echo Farm
description: A bustling equestrian facility established in 1826 in South Salem, bordering the Ward Pound Ridge Reservation trails. USHJA approved, offering riding lessons for children and adults, an IEA team, horsemanship program, and boarding.

name: Netherwood Acres
description: A full-service equestrian facility offering horseback riding, horse boarding, training, and sales in Hyde Park, Dutchess County. Set in the scenic Hudson Valley, Netherwood Acres provides personalized care in a rural farm setting.

name: Hazelnut Farms
description: An equestrian farm in South Salem, Westchester County, offering boarding and riding programs. Located on scenic grounds in the heart of Westchester horse country, Hazelnut Farms provides quality care in a peaceful rural setting.

name: Larkspur Farm
description: A top-quality full service boarding facility located in North Salem, NY, with exceptional design and state-of-the-art amenities built for efficiency, safety, and wellbeing.

name: Centurion Farm
description: Centurion Farm is a premier equestrian facility nestled in the heart of Alpharetta, GA offering boarding and riding lessons for riders at all stages.

name: Windsor Stables
description: Windsor Stables is Atlanta's premiere equestrian center, a full-service boarding and training facility dedicated to the goal-oriented rider. Their world-class trainers and grooms cater to each client's specific needs, offering top-quality horse care and instruction in and out of the arena.

name: In Your Dreams Horse Farm
description: In Your Dreams Horse Farm is a professional 22-acre training venue in Alpharetta offering dry stalls, two spacious arenas (a large covered arena and an outdoor lighted arena), and a collaborative community for trainers dedicated to excellence.

name: Chastain Horse Park
description: Chastain Horse Park is one of the last two remaining urban horse parks in the United States, located within Atlanta's Chastain Park community.

name: Fortitude Farm
description: Fortitude Farm is a premier hunter/jumper training, boarding, and lesson facility in the Alpharetta/Milton area north of Atlanta. Founded by Carolyn Bell, the farm offers instruction at all levels with a mission to help riders achieve individual goals through friendly, positive instruction.

name: Millstone Stables
description: Millstone Stables is a first-class hunter/jumper boarding, training, and lesson facility set on 16 rolling acres in north metro Atlanta, centrally located on the border of north Fulton and southeast Cherokee counties convenient to Woodstock, Milton, Alpharetta, Roswell, East Cobb, and Canton.

name: WildeWood Farm
description: WildeWood Farm is a privately-owned, multi-generational farm in Cumming, Georgia, operating since 1996. The farm has been voted Best in Forsyth five consecutive years for best stable and best equestrian facility.

name: Jaid Stables
description: Jaid Stables is Canton's premier stables for horse boarding and rider training, nationally recognized as a training academy that gives clients the correct building blocks for a proven lifetime of successful horse showing.

name: Lioncrest Farms
description: Lioncrest Farms is a full-service equestrian facility in Canton, Georgia offering boarding, riding lessons, horse training, hippotherapy, and summer camp.

name: The Horse Park at Woodside
description: A 501(c)(3) nonprofit equestrian facility on 362 acres near Woodside, California. The Horse Park at Woodside hosts premier competition events including the Woodside Horse Trials, and offers boarding, training, a covered arena, cross-country course, and educational programs.

name: Williams Ranch Boarding
description: A historic 150-acre family ranch in the Santa Cruz Mountains just 15 minutes from downtown Woodside, owned and operated by the Williams/McReynolds family since 1853.

name: Oasis Farms Woodside
description: A premier hunter/jumper and dressage training facility located at Portola Farms in Woodside, serving the greater Bay Area.

name: Windy Hill Equestrians
description: A premier Bay Area hunter/jumper facility located at Fremont Hills Country Club in Los Altos Hills, conveniently situated minutes off Highway 280.

name: Miwok Equestrian Center
description: Formerly Miwok Livery Stables, Miwok Equestrian Center is a nonprofit organization set within the Golden Gate National Recreation Area in Tennessee Valley, Mill Valley. The center offers English hunter/jumper lessons for riders ages 6 and up, show teams, and seasonal summer camps.

name: Dickson Ranch

The property features an indoor arena, two outdoor arenas (White and Red), a round pen, and cross-country trails through open fields and redwood forest.

name: Longview Stables
description: A full-service training program in Novato dedicated to teaching all riders from their first pony ride through advanced competition. Longview Stables emphasizes personal development and sportsmanship alongside riding skills, with programs spanning beginner through competitive levels.

name: Ocean Riders of Marin
description: A sustainably run, community-based nonprofit horse boarding facility at the historic Golden Gate Dairy Stables in Muir Beach, operating as a Park Partner with the Golden Gate National Recreation Area. Horses live in roomy paddocks with attached shelters and receive daily turnout.

name: Blue Dot Barn
description: A full-service horse boarding facility nestled in the scenic Nicasio Valley of Marin County, California. Blue Dot Barn is committed to providing exceptional care for horses in a beautiful natural setting, offering a peaceful environment with spacious accommodations and dedicated on-site management.

name: Walnut Hill Stables
description: Walnut Hill Stables is a family-owned equestrian facility in Marengo, Ohio, conveniently located just 2 miles off I-71 and 30 minutes from downtown Columbus. The facility offers boarding, riding lessons, training, sales, and summer camps.

name: Lindsay Yinger Show Stables
description: Lindsay Yinger Show Stables specializes in cultivating riders' careers from lead line through 'AA' shows, offering tailored hunter/jumper programs since 2006.

name: TAG Farms
description: TAG Farms is the premier equine facility in Central Ohio, located at 8363 Schleppi Road in Westerville, just 5 minutes from Highway 161 and convenient to New Albany, Gahanna, and Johnstown.

name: Colter Equestrian Center
description: Colter Equestrian Center is a hunter/jumper barn located near Columbus, Ohio in Plain City. Under trainer Carrie McCurrach, Colter offers horseback riding lessons for all levels from beginner through advanced, as well as training and boarding.

name: Duzan Riding Academy
description: Founded in 2009, Duzan Riding Academy is a USHJA Recognized Riding Academy on 23 acres in Ostrander, Ohio. The facility features a 200' x 90' insulated indoor arena, a 250' x 125' outdoor arena, quality constructed stalls, trails, and a jump field.

name: Wheeler Stables
description: Wheeler Stables is an 18-acre horse farm in Westerville, Ohio offering a friendly, laid-back environment for horses and riders. The facility features 16 spacious 12x12 stalls, 5 large pastures, 3 dry lots, indoor and outdoor riding arenas, a large tack room, and a hot and cold wash rack.

name: Lunar Winds Stables
description: Lunar Winds Stables is a family-run equestrian facility at 4890 Neff Road in Grove City, Ohio. The main barn offers 25 stalls with skylights and a wide aisle, plus a separate indoor barrel racing track with 30 additional stalls.

name: Creekside Equestrian
description: Creekside Equestrian is a full-service, family-owned boarding and training facility located in Parker, Colorado. The horse-first philosophy ensures each animal receives individualized care and attention, with a welcoming community atmosphere for riders of all levels.

name: Bell Mountain Ranch Equestrian Center
description: Bell Mountain Ranch Equestrian Center in Castle Rock combines state-of-the-art technology with personalized care across multiple boarding options. The facility features a large indoor arena, two outdoor arenas, and over 30 miles of trails, welcoming all riding styles in a no-drama environment.

name: Black Kettle Ranch

name: Mariah Farms

name: Platinum Farms

name: Cottonwood Riding Club

name: Coventry Farms

The facility offers top-tier riding lessons, training, and boarding with a welcoming community where clients become family, serving both beginners and seasoned competitors.

name: Mile High Horse Ranch

name: Stockton's Plum Creek Stables
description: Stockton's Plum Creek Stables has been serving the Littleton, Colorado equestrian community for over five decades, backing directly onto Chatfield State Park for exclusive trail access.

name: Triton Stables
description: A family-owned hunter/jumper facility with over 40 years of history, situated on 59 acres just 10 miles from North Raleigh and Brier Creek.

name: MacNair's Country Acres
description: A full-service equestrian center in southwest Raleigh offering horse boarding, leases, riding lessons for all ages, IEA and 4-H programs, horse shows, and popular summer horseback riding camps.

name: Brightleaf Stables
description: A beginner-friendly boarding and lesson barn in Durham offering horseback riding instruction for all ages and skill levels.

name: Castle Farm

name: Punchestown Stable
