name: Castlewood Farm
description: Castlewood Farm is a 10-acre hunter jumper show facility in Wellington, FL with 40 stalls, two sand arenas, and a Grand Prix grass field. Operating since 1990, they offer boarding, instruction from beginner to Grand Prix, and an extensive horse sales program.

name: Steffee Showjumping
description: Steffee Showjumping is a full-service hunter jumper facility in Wellington, FL managed by Livia and Sean Steffee. The 5-acre property features 12 stalls, an all-weather arena, covered grooming stalls, private turnout paddocks, and 24-hour on-site trainers.

trainers.name: Livia Steffee
trainers.bio: Co-manager and trainer specializing in hunter/jumper training and sales.

trainers.name: Sean Steffee
trainers.bio: Co-manager and trainer specializing in hunter/jumper training and sales.

name: Donato Farms
description: Donato Farms is a premier dressage training facility in Wellington, FL and training base for Pan Am Gold Medalist Sarah Lockman Tubman and FEI judge Lee Tubman. The facility features a covered arena with lights and sound system, spacious stalls, and top-quality footing.

trainers.name: Sarah Lockman Tubman
trainers.bio: Pan American Games Gold Medalist and accomplished FEI dressage rider.

trainers.name: Lee Tubman
trainers.bio: Grand Prix dressage rider, FEI 4* judge, USDF S judge, and former Canadian National Grand Prix Champion.

name: MRK Dressage
description: MRK Dressage is a dressage training and sales program based in Wellington, FL offering full training from Training level through Grand Prix. The facility includes grassy turnouts, a euro walker, and a covered arena with full grooming services.

name: Laura Ashley Dressage
description: Laura Ashley Dressage is a 5-acre dressage training and boarding facility in Wellington, FL minutes from Global Dressage Festival. Full training and boarding starts at $3,000/month with lessons, arena access, turnout, and show opportunities from beginner to Grand Prix.

trainers.name: Laura Ashley
trainers.bio: Grand Prix dressage rider, FEI trainer, USDF Gold/Silver/Bronze medalist, and one of only 47 USDF Certified Trainer/Instructors through 4th level in the US.

name: Halvorsrød Farm
description: Halvorsrød Farm is a dressage facility in the Little Ranches area of Wellington, FL offering dry stalls and full board customized to individual horse needs. The farm serves both amateur and professional dressage competitors, with lay-up and recovery programs available.

name: Always A Breeze Boarding Stable
description: Always A Breeze is a small pasture boarding facility on 11 acres in Meadow Wood Farms near Ocala, FL, specializing in retired and semi-retired horses. The property features large oak-shaded pastures with access to 26 additional acres for riding.

name: Diasti Stables
description: Diasti Stables is a luxury equestrian facility on over 110 acres in Morriston, FL, featuring 68 stalls across four barns with Spanish-style architecture. The farm offers boarding, dressage and jumping rings, 3 miles of trails, on-site apartments, and is minutes from HITS and WEC.

name: Country Road Farm
description: Country Road Farm is a premier thoroughbred boarding facility on 80 acres in Ocala, FL, offering field and stall boarding since 1980. The physician-owned farm specializes in post-surgical care, wound management, and recovery boarding with meticulously maintained paddocks.

name: Salty Acres
description: Salty Acres is a 40-acre boarding facility in Dunnellon, FL with an 8-stall Morton barn featuring Stable Comfort mattress systems and individual fans. Located minutes from Rainbow Springs, HITS, and WEC, with nearby state parks for trail riding.

name: Meadowood Farm
description: Meadowood Farm is a hunter jumper training facility in Ocala, FL owned by trainer Lauren Schweppe, offering lessons and training for beginners through advanced riders. The program covers hunters, jumpers, and equitation with over 25 years of show experience.

trainers.name: Lauren Schweppe
trainers.bio: Hunter jumper trainer with over 25 years of experience showing hunters, from local shows to Indoors and Congress.

name: High Standards Farm
description: High Standards Farm is a boutique show jumping facility on 10 acres in Ocala, FL offering seasonal and annual full boarding with custom care packages. Located within 20 minutes of WEC, HITS, and Florida Horse Park.

name: STC Dressage
description: STC Dressage is a dressage training facility in Ocala, FL offering training programs from green horses to FEI level, rider coaching, and young horse development. They also specialize in sourcing and developing quality sale horses.

name: RKC Dressage
description: RKC Dressage is a dressage facility in Ocala, FL offering training, coaching, young horse development, and facility rentals. They also specialize in imported dressage horse sales and CEM quarantine services.

name: ALR Dressage
description: ALR Dressage is a dressage training and lesson program in Ocala, FL run by USDF Bronze, Silver, and Gold Medalist Allyson Rogers. Offering customized training packages and instruction from Training through FEI levels, with lessons available Tuesday through Sunday.

trainers.name: Allyson Rogers
trainers.bio: USDF Bronze, Silver, and Gold Medalist with extensive experience training horses and riders from Training through FEI levels.

name: Hidden Acres Dressage
description: Hidden Acres Dressage is a dressage training and lesson facility in Ocala, FL specializing in imports, sales prep, and horse training at all ages and levels. They offer dressage lessons on your own horse with trailer-ins welcome, and organize European horse-buying trips.

name: Mint Equine
description: Mint Equine is a dressage training facility in Ocala, FL offering classical training with cross-training for all levels and breeds. They also provide full-care rehabilitation services for horses recovering from injury or time off.
